exercises.title: GG02 Protocol Simulator
exercises.description: Build a complete GG02 protocol simulation with parameter estimation.
tasks: Implement Gaussian random modulation for Alice
Model lossy quantum channel with excess noise
Create homodyne and heterodyne detection modes
Implement parameter estimation from measurement data
exercises.expectedOutput: Complete GG02 simulation with security analysis
hints: Homodyne: measure X or P with shot noise

exercises.title: Phase Space Visualizer
exercises.description: Create interactive phase space visualizations for CV states.
tasks: Compare vacuum, thermal, and squeezed states
hints: Coherent state: Gaussian centered at α
Vacuum: circular at origin with variance 1
Squeezed: ellipse with ΔX < 1 or ΔP < 1
Use contour plots for probability distributions

exercises.title: Noise Budget Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate and analyze noise contributions in CV-QKD.
tasks: Calculate phase noise from laser linewidth
Determine maximum tolerable noise for key generation
hints: Electronic: often quoted in dB below shot noise

exercises.title: CV vs DV Performance Comparison
exercises.description: Compare CV-QKD and DV-QKD performance across scenarios.
tasks: Model key rates for both approaches
Plot key rate vs distance curves
exercises.expectedOutput: Comprehensive CV vs DV comparison tool
